titleStmt.title: SII 18.121: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 121. (B.K. No. 155 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJĀPUR TALUK, BIJĀPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 47, Śubhakṛit, Jyēshṭhā s11u. Pañchami, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1122, May 11, Thursday, f.d.t. ·61.

It registers a grant of land made by Gōvindarasa of Kōḍali to the school at the agrahāra Pauṭhage. The gift-land was purchased by him from Āhavamallarasa, the manneya of Tardavāḍi Thousand and from Kanna-gāvuṇḍa of Arjunige.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccaḷukyavikrama
varṣada nālvattēḷeneya śubha
kritsaṁvatsarada jēṣṭha suddha paṁcami
brihaspativāradaṁdu © svasti sama
staprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tarddavāḍi sāsirada maṁnne
ya Āhamamallarasara kayyalu
ri saḍagarada koḍigeyoḷage śrīma
nmahāpradhāna daṇḍanāyakaṁ kōḍali
ya gōviṁdarasaru Innūṟanālva
tu gadyāṇa poṁge kālaḍiya
mūnūṟaṟuvattumattarkkeyya mā
ṟugoṁḍu śrīmadagrahāra pauṭhage
ya śālege Avāri bhōjanakke biṭṭaru
© mattavā koḍageyyoḷage Arjjunige
ya gaṁnagāvuṁḍana manneyadakayya
lu kālaḍiya Eṁbhattu mattarkkeyyaṁ
haḍadu pauṭhageya śālege biṭṭa . maṁga
ḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 18.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
